summary.lv: Q.BEYOND meklē tīkla speciālistu ar pieredzi Fortinet, VMware un Cisco produktos, kurš/-a projektēs un uzturēs LAN/WAN infrastruktūru un nodrošinās tīkla drošību.
summary.en: Q.BEYOND is looking for a network specialist experienced with Fortinet, VMware SD-WAN, and Cisco Nexus to design, implement, and maintain LAN/WAN infrastructure and security.
